list.title: Decision trees
list.subtitle: Author and version the recommendation engine's decision trees. Each save lands as a draft; publish to make it the active version.
list.missingCapability: You need the {{capability}} capability to author trees.

create.title: New decision tree
create.subtitle: Authoring is YAML-driven for the node graph; metadata is form-driven. The first save lands as v1 (draft).

fields.codeHint: Used in URLs and stored on every recommendation. Cannot change later.
fields.cropCodeHint: From the crop catalog. Leave blank for crop-agnostic.
fields.yamlHint: Must include code, name_en, root, nodes. See an existing tree for the structure.

templates.heading: Start from template
templates.emptyDesc: Single root + two placeholder leaves. Edit on the canvas.
templates.scoutStressDesc: Recommend a scouting visit when NDVI drops below baseline, severity-tiered by the size of the drop.
templates.ndviAlertDesc: Fire a severity-tagged alert when NDVI falls below its seasonal baseline.
templates.irrigationDesc: Skip irrigation when meaningful rain is in the 24h forecast.

yaml.heading: Tree YAML
yaml.subtitle: Editing creates a new draft version. The compiled hash deduplicates identical saves.
yaml.noChange: No change since the latest version — save is disabled.

dryRun.heading: Dry-run against a block
dryRun.subtitle: Walk the in-editor tree against a real block without writing a recommendation row.
dryRun.noMatch: No actionable outcome (tree returned no_action or no path).

viewer.emptyTree: Tree has no nodes to display yet.
viewer.compiledMissing: The published version is missing its compiled body — re-publish the version to regenerate it.

header.saveFailed: Save failed — the YAML editor has more detail.
header.publishFailed: Publish failed — the YAML editor has more detail.
header.fixErrorsHint: Fix the listed issues before saving.

canvas.rewireFailed: Couldn't rewire — see the structural error list.

unreachable.heading: {{count}} node(s) unreachable from root
unreachable.body: These nodes still exist in the YAML but no on_match/on_miss pointer leads to them — usually the side-effect of a rewire. Clean them up or open the YAML editor to re-attach.

addChild.title: Add child node
addChild.kindDecisionDesc: Branch the flow on a signal-driven condition.
addChild.kindRecDesc: Leaf that surfaces a confidence-scored suggestion.
addChild.kindAlertDesc: Leaf that fires a severity-tagged notification.
addChild.kindNoopDesc: Leaf that explicitly says nothing should happen.
addChild.nodeIdHint: Stable identifier — letters, numbers, underscores. Used in YAML and audit logs.
addChild.failed: Couldn't add — try a different id.

condition.empty: No condition set — add a term below.

delete.title: Delete node?
delete.singleBody: Remove "{{nodeId}}" from the tree. The parent pointer that referenced it will be cleared.
delete.cascadeBody: Remove "{{nodeId}}" and {{count}} node(s) in its subtree. The parent pointer that referenced it will be cleared.

panel.selectHint: Click a node on the canvas to see its details.
panel.selectHintActions: Edit, delete, and add-child controls live in this panel — they appear per-selected-node.
panel.branchesFilledHint: Both branches are already wired. Delete a child first, or drag a branch port onto a different node to rewire.

condition.heading: Condition
condition.deferredNote: Condition-tree editing isn't surfaced visually yet — use the YAML editor for now.
condition.unsupportedNote: This condition uses a shape the visual editor doesn't model yet — open the YAML editor to change it.

parameters.heading: Tree parameters
parameters.empty: This tree doesn't declare any parameters yet.

errors.nameTaken: A parameter with that name already exists.

overrides.heading: Your overrides
overrides.empty: This tree has no declared parameters to override yet.
overrides.readOnlyHint: Read-only (you don't have the manage capability).
